headline: Sweden approves Tesla FSD Supervised for public testing — 2nd EU member state greenlight after Netherlands; confirms EU regulatory cascade accelerating ahead of summer EU-wide harmonization; Tesla also unveils AI4+ FSD computer with more memory and compute for improved inference on all new-build vehicles
Tesla files S-8 registering 303.9M shares for Musk (2018 comp award) — NOT a sale; Delaware Supreme Court restored award Dec 2025; next taxable event not until Jan 2028 per TeslaBoomerMama

TSLA post-earnings week: ~$340 low, closes Apr 27 at $378.67 (+0.63%); Wall St consensus Buy, avg PT $405 (29 analysts); Motley Fool: 300x earnings valuation 'sky-high'; robotaxi revenue 'relatively small until 2027'

FSD China approval slips again to Q3 2026 — Tesla execs confirmed on Q1 call; Musk had promised Feb/Mar at Davos; ~15M Chinese Tesla owners remain without FSD access; pattern of regulatory delays weighs on global licensing thesis

Giga Berlin records best-ever Q1 with 61,000+ vehicles built, then announces 20% production increase and 1,000 new hires — Electrek notes factory still at ~65% of 375K stated capacity; headroom remains for further ramp through 2026

Tesla announces AI4+ FSD computer with more memory and compute — upgraded HW4 hardware begins shipping in new vehicles; bridges current fleet toward HW5/AI5 performance levels; improves FSD inference latency and model capacity

Tesla confirms FSD v14 Lite arriving late June 2026 for HW3 vehicles — brings next-gen autonomous behaviors to older cars; supervised-only; HW3 cannot achieve Unsupervised FSD per Musk; free HW3→HW4 retrofit path still available

Tesla opens direct sales to 50,000 government agencies via Sourcewell contract — cities, counties, schools, utilities all eligible for institutional fleet purchases; first structured bulk-sales channel outside retail
Tesla confirms Cybercab has NO production cap as ramp begins — Musk says volumes will scale 'exponentially by end of 2026'; demand-driven production model unlike any prior Tesla vehicle

Tesla hits $546M annual recurring revenue from FSD subscriptions — 1.28M active subscribers as of Q1 (+51% YoY); subscription-only transition turning FSD into a SaaS revenue stream growing faster than vehicle deliveries
